draft.conclusion: 评审结论：存在阻塞问题，请求修改。

findings.problem: The patch adds a string blacklist for one domain value while the domain/path/key index stays an ordinary object. object.create map 普通对象 数据结构 嵌套 constructor
findings.evidence: __proto__ used as the path or key (this.idx[domain]['__proto__'], this.idx[domain][path]['__proto__']) still hits the prototype chain, other magic keys like constructor/prototype are not blocked, and any variant that parses back to __proto__ bypasses an exact-string check. Only a data-structure fix closes the class. data-structure exact-string
findings.impact: __proto__ used as the path or key (this.idx[domain]['__proto__'], this.idx[domain][path]['__proto__']) still hits the prototype chain, other magic keys like constructor/prototype are not blocked, and any variant that parses back to __proto__ bypasses an exact-string check. Only a data-structure fix closes the class. data-structure exact-string
findings.fix: Use Object.create(null) or Map for every index layer (and/or reject unsafe keys centrally), then re-run the PoC plus variant and nested-key tests. object.create(null nested-key

draft.tests: The new test only replays __proto__ at the domain layer. Prototype-pollution defenses need variant and nested-layer tests: __proto__ as path and key, constructor/prototype keys, and a check that the index has no prototype. test path test key 测试 嵌套 test constructor missing test 缺 测试
